title: Support typedef overwrites with unpacked dimensions and in classes
body:
It is possible to declare a new typedef that shadows an existing typedef in
a higher level scope. E.g.

```SystemVerilog
typedef int T;
module M;
  typedef real T;
endmodule
```

In the current implementation this does not work if the new type has unpacked
dimensions. It also does not work inside class scopes.

Support for both can be added with some small changes to the parser.
